title: Reframe adv_status stale blank assistant message recommendation

tasks.title: Add failing status/session-debt formatter test proving blank assistant message recommendation does not frame active-session rows as stale/deletable.
tasks.verification: Added failing-then-green status recommendation regression. Red phase failed because recommendation still used `Stale OpenCode blank assistant messages`; green asserts neutral `OpenCode blank assistant session debt detected` and no `before deletion` wording.
tasks.summary: Updated status recommendation tests to reject stale/deletion framing and require dry-run classification wording.
tasks.implementation_summary: Updated status recommendation tests to reject stale/deletion framing and require dry-run classification wording.

tasks.title: Update adv_status doctor wording to distinguish active-session debt from orphan/repairable rows and keep deletion guidance safety-gated.
tasks.verification: Updated adv_status doctor recommendation to neutral safety wording: `OpenCode blank assistant session debt detected` and `classify live vs orphan rows before any cleanup`. This avoids implying all rows are stale/deletable.
tasks.summary: Reframed doctor recommendation text in status tool to distinguish session debt from deletion-safe rows.
tasks.implementation_summary: Reframed doctor recommendation text in status tool to distinguish session debt from deletion-safe rows.

tasks.title: Run focused status/session-debt tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm vitest run src/tools/status.test.ts --reporter=verbose; pnpm run check

proposal.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #92.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed from issue #92 and relation to #91. Status wording should not imply all blank assistant rows are stale/deletable; it should distinguish active-session debt from repairable orphan rows where possible. No conflict found.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan updates status wording to be safety-preserving and aligned with #91 classification. No HITL tradeoff, conflict, or contract compromise.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #92.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Reframed adv_status doctor recommendation from stale/deletion framing to neutral session-debt wording: `OpenCode blank assistant session debt detected` and dry-run classification of live vs orphan rows before cleanup. Verification: `pnpm vitest run src/tools/status.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed (25 tests); `pnpm run check` passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
